case_title: SILVERIO M. BARANDA III VS. VERONICA BURGET

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BURGET, VERONICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SILVERIO M. BARANDA III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERONICA BURGET ASSISTED BY FRANZ BURGET, DEFENDNAT'S SON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARANDA III, SILVERIO M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGET, VERONICA $2,610.42 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-02-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BARANDA III, SILVERIO M. AS TO DEFENDANT BURGET, VERONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
